title: Romantic Crispy Chinese White Bread Sweet And Sour
description: A sweet and crispy Chinese dish from Zhejiang featuring white bread, perfect for a romantic evening, and friendly to sugar-free diets.
instructions: Cut the white bread into 1-inch cubes and set aside.
In a large bowl, mix together the cornstarch, sugar substitute, and a pinch of salt.
Add the beaten eggs to the bowl and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Add the bread cubes to the bowl and toss until they are evenly coated with the batter.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the battered bread cubes to the skillet and fry until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the fried bread from the skillet and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
In a small bowl, whisk together the vinegar and ketchup.
Add the vinegar and ketchup mixture to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer the sauce for 2-3 minutes or until thickened.
Add the fried bread back to the skillet and toss to coat with the sweet and sour sauce.
